problem_text: Count all the letters in this question (ignore spaces, punctuation, and digits). Call this count N. Then find the sum of the digits of N. What is the final result?
notes: N = 126 letters (a-z, A-Z only, ignoring spaces and punctuation). Digit sum of 126 = 1+2+6 = 9. Two-step problem: accurate letter count of 126 characters, then digit sum. Most errors come from miscounting letters.
